response.justification: The candidate is an experienced full-stack engineer with a strong web and systems background (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang), but does not meet the core requirements of this role. C++ experience is limited to a ~6-month stint at National Instruments in 2014–2015 and a university thesis project, far short of the mandatory 5–10 years of hands-on Windows C++ development. There is no SQL Server or Oracle experience listed (MongoDB/MySQL only), and no fixed income, derivatives, or capital markets domain exposure — RIDE Capital was investment-adjacent fintech but built on a Node/GraphQL stack. The gap on all mandatory criteria makes this a poor fit despite solid general engineering credentials.
strengths: Broad, long-tenured software engineering career with strong testing and craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD)
Low-latency, high-throughput systems experience at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic (millions of requests/sec)
CI/CD, Docker, and dev-ops infrastructure experience matching the desirable skills list
concerns: Only ~6 months of professional C++ experience, versus the mandatory 5–10 years on Windows
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; database background is MongoDB/MySQL
No fixed income, derivatives, or capital markets domain knowledge; fintech exposure was brief and on a JavaScript stack

key_factors.factor: No fixed income / capital markets domain expertise
Strong general engineering and performance-systems background
